channel.title: Comments for page "The Elusive Anderson"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Elusive Anderson"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks for the kind words Deci.

I'm glad you have enjoyed Merlo as much as you have. She was originally supposed to be a one time appearance in JTH, so I'm glad that she has found an audience.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Very good series. Sasha Merlo is just such a cool gal.

item.title: Time I got around to this...
item.content:encoded:
Hey there,

This brief work is the hub for the -ing Anderson series of tales that I wrote earlier this year.

I finally got a small amount of time and decided to add a hub.

Special thanks to Decibelle, TwistedGears, and Goomy for their feedback.

Enjoy, and apologies to those of you who start at this hub and continue expecting more Navarro.
